title: How we draw a Tiny Friend from sketch to finished page.
lead: Every book in the Animal Series starts with the same question: would I want this on my fridge? Here's the eight-step path from a pencil scribble to the dashed-bordered cover.
heroCaption: Tiny Friends · finished cover. Photo by Aiko Tanaka.

authorCard.label: About the author
authorCard.bio: Founder of iRoly. Illustrator. Spends an unreasonable amount of time drawing sleepy foxes. Based in Tokyo.
